content:
1. Converts °C/°F/K temps (via °C intermediate), rounds to 2 dp, rejects results <0 K. Exists for weather-service unit conversion.

2. Absolute-zero check applies only to Kelvin output; extending the enum or altering formulas will break the match blocks.

3. Whether to add explicit NaN/Inf guards (see "Open" note).

4. NaN/Inf propagation, inputs already <0 K when source is K, non-numeric values, and future enum members.
